essence: Develops fire strategies for buildings, ensuring safe evacuation, compliance, and effective fire‑safety design.

identity.title: Fire Strategy Consultant
identity.summary: Creates fire strategies for new and existing buildings, analysing layouts, evacuation routes, fire‑resistance measures, and system requirements to meet regulations.

salary.notes: Senior consultants working on high‑rise, complex commercial, or industrial projects can exceed £85k-£100k+.

qualifications: Training in fire‑safety engineering or fire‑strategy development
Knowledge of building regulations, fire dynamics, and evacuation modelling
Ability to produce fire‑strategy reports and compliance documentation
Understanding of passive and active fire‑protection systems

lifestyle.description: Fire strategy consultants work with architects, engineers, and developers to design safe buildings. They analyse layouts, evacuation routes, fire‑resistance measures, and system requirements. The role suits individuals who enjoy technical design, regulatory interpretation, and contributing to life‑safety planning.

habits: Reviews architectural drawings and building layouts
Ensures compliance with building regulations and standards
Collaborates with architects, engineers, and inspectors
Assesses evacuation routes and fire‑protection measures
